name: ExtensionMolecularSequence_Relative_SequenceRange
title: R5: Indicates the nucleotide range in the composed sequence when multiple 'relative' elements are used together (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MolecularSequence.relative.sequenceRange` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MolecularSequence.relative.sequenceRange` 0..1 `Range`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MolecularSequence.relative.sequenceRange` 0..1 `Range`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MolecularSequence.relative.sequenceRange` is part of an existing definition because parent element `MolecularSequence.relative` requires an extension for additional cardinality.
Element `MolecularSequence.relative.sequenceRange` has a context of MolecularSequence based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MolecularSequence`.
Element `MolecularSequence.relative.sequenceRange` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
